> ● The following text has been human translated, primarily provided by B.I.A.V. Studio.
>   ○ Awakener Lines: All Awakeners' voice lines and battle interaction lines from "Traphase". About 65% of all Communicator dialogues.
>    ○ "Main Story": All content from "Prologue of Faded Legacy" to "Final Chapter of Faded Legacy", as well as all content from "Chapter 3 of Astral Reign" and "Chapter 4 of Astral Reign".
>    ○ "Special Ops":  Salvador "The Color of Blood",  Horla "Rose's Abode".
>    ○ "Psyche Deepdive": Liz "Passion to Dust", Kathigu-Ra "Everburning Vex".
>    ○ "Dreamscape": Uvhash and Agrippa Chapter "Culinary Domination", Miryam Chapter "Desecrate", Castor Chapter "Beyond the Skies: Part I", Pollux Chapter "Beyond the Skies: Part II".
>    ○ "Reproduction Frenzy": Murphy's Chapter, Miryam's Chapter, Doresain's Chapter, Pickman's Chapter, Kathigu-Ra's Chapter, Castor's Chapter, Pollux's Chapter.
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1377236011653795880/1377236561271459952
> We've implemented human-proofread English text for:
> ● Liz's Psyche Deepdive story: Passion to Dust

all I could find, maybe there's more since I only looked at keywords. Looks like they might be using MTL on the patch notes too, so Dreamscape, Deepdive, and Special Ops might be called differently in some posts. Searched for 'human' to get around that but didnt find anything else

what exactly is a domain / artificial domain? i just finished gramonas story and now reading through sorels
a domain is an "in between" space of sorts between reality and other dimensions
the prologue did try to explain it but it gets glossed over
an artificial domain is a man made version of a domain where the space and duration can be adjusted for safety
technically speaking the dungeon section of each level is supposed to be a visual representation of the domain(?) but idk how much the devs intend to stick to it
point is that domains dont quite operate on reality logic and thats why the events in them are uncanny
i see.. thanks for the explanation! pretty interesting that doll made an artificial version of it. so theyre trying to dive into it to "relive" ||and investigate sorels murder||
yeppers
honestly the artificial domain is a scientific marvel
given its still in the early stages but its been useful so far

For more context a "domain" is a common concept in chinese and east asian fantasy

It's a catch-all term for a pocket dimension that exists on a separate layer of reality

Domains also appear in a lot of anime and manga, in genshin impact, etc
